name: ent-bridge-indirect-entails
note: FINAL UNIT iteration 2 (premise-scoped entailment): the page quote is only an INDIRECT reference ('wrinkle-relaxing injections') that cannot alone prove the atomic breach claim; the owning record's OWN duty text, supplied verbatim as a SECOND catalogue-rule premise (claim.bridge), lists that indirect reference, so the premises COMPOSE to entailment and the claim ships. The bridge is trusted catalogue text (Rule 2), not model knowledge (Rule 11/C-147).

claims.claim: This website does advertise a prescription only medicine to the public
claims.premise: Book in this month for our wrinkle-relaxing injections
claims.bridge: Do not advertise any prescription only medicine to the public; treat indirect references such as 'wrinkle-relaxing injections' and 'anti-wrinkle treatment' as references to a prescription only medicine

scripted_response.rationale: the page names an indirect reference the rule lists as a reference to a prescription only medicine, so the two premises together establish the claim
